answers.Q1: FULLY IMPLEMENTED. generator.send() (generator.rs:350-428), throw() (441-516), close() (519-567) all exist. GeneratorExit and StopIteration exceptions implemented. dispatch_generator_method() in class.rs handles .send/.throw/.close on generator objects. Thread-based architecture with OS threads + sync channels. Conformance tests exist in tests/fixtures/conformance/generators/.
answers.Q2: NEEDS EXTENSION. tokio_exec.rs has coroutine support (mb_tokio_spawn, mb_tokio_gather, mb_await) but NO async generator support. Missing: async yield protocol, async generator state machine, StopAsyncIteration exception. The coroutine registry (async_rt.rs) would need to be extended for async generator suspend/resume.
answers.Q3: SYNC WORKING, ASYNC NOT. Sync __iter__/__next__ work (iter.rs). Sync __enter__/__exit__ work (class.rs:1339-1379). AsyncFor is PARSED but silently dropped in ast_to_hir.rs (falls through to _ => None). AsyncWith is parsed but collapsed into regular With (ast_to_hir.rs:751). Missing: __aiter__/__anext__/__aenter__/__aexit__ dunder dispatch, HirStmt::AsyncFor and AsyncWith variants, async codegen in hir_to_mir.rs.
